title: GenesisAeon/genesis-os: v0.2.0 – Live cosmic-web emergence simulation + Dash GUI
description: genesis-os v0.2.0 extends the self-reflective operating framework with: (1) CosmicWebSimulator for live cosmic-web node emergence driven by the Unified Lagrangian L = T - V + Φ(H) + Γ(C,R,E,P) and UTAC-Logistic entropy evolution; (2) a Dash-based real-time web GUI (dashboard/web_gui.py) with CREP radar, entropy/Lagrangian dual-axis chart, and emergence event visualisation; (3) extended CLI (genesis-os cycle --gui) to launch the Dash server optionally; (4) emergence_events field in GenesisState with EmergenceEvent records; and (5) >500 pytest tests with 99%+ coverage.
